C[likeyeah: Sorry about the delay there. Ch-ch-changes. The Lyric is awesome so far.
C[likeyeah: Sorry about the delay there. Ch-ch-changes. The Lyric is awesome so far.
C[fireproof: No worries! Figured you had plenty on your plate :)
fireproof: Did I mention a little 8 year old showed up to our local coffeeshop go club? Proceeded to KICK MY ASS. Pretty entertaining :)
C[likeyeah: Oh man, that's pretty great. I'm not having kids, but my best friend who is pregnant promised me I could teach her kid Go from a young age. I'm hoping to create one of those little mofos!
C[fireproof: Right? I just couldn't get my son interested. Ah well :)
likeyeah: I bet he'll come around one day...
C[fireproof: Good point - kids are flexible. Hope you have a good weekend after your first week at the Lyric!

likeyeah: Thanks Matt, honestly, starting a new job sucks, but this week has been 10x better than my best week at CPM -- it's all the department, development there... is just a very unpleasant place to work. It's too bad, but at least I found something else that suits me.

C[fireproof: So glad! I'm heading to Chicago on Friday (oooh, can hardly wait to experience the weather) and it'll be interesting to get a feel for how the org is changing. Seems to be hitting another rocky patch.
C[likeyeah: Yeah it's hard for me to say how things are in other departments, I just know that Development is in turmoil and I'm so glad I got out of there.
likeyeah: Yeah so, you might even get to see some snow on your visit! How long are you in town?
C[fireproof: Saturday to Saturday, basically... Finn will be so jealous, he still thinks snow is fluffy and exciting.

C[likeyeah: In December, sure, in April, it's pure frozen misery >:( Hm, well I'm out of town this weekend, but let me know if you have any time to meet up for a game.... And let me know how you find things at CPM
C[fireproof: That would be great, I will -- maybe Monday or Tuesday?
likeyeah: That could work, we'll talk

C[likeyeah: Hi guess what I have a cold and feel like crap, of course. Can't really call in to work as it's only my 3rd week though.... Plans to do Trivia with Bryan and another ex-CPMer on Wednesday if you're available?
fireproof: No worries -- take it easy, we can play IRL go another time! Wed would be cool, but I may be meeting with folks Wednesday night...
C[likeyeah: kk thanks. All good, let me know if you can make it.
C[likeyeah: hah, good morning. Happy birthday!! (I think?)
fireproof: Yup... and it's an all-day meeting with our VC to celebrate :|
C[fireproof: yeah, well just let me have a LITTLE bit please.
C[likeyeah: You're gettin' a lot more than a little!
C[fireproof: How're things at the Lyric? Smoothing out?

C[likeyeah: Yeah, it's great here! It was kind of a stressful transition, but I am very glad I made the move. My boss is like, really cool and smart and gives me autonomy, the micromanagement I experienced at CPM was just intolerable.
C[fireproof: That sounds like a great relief.!
C[likeyeah: Have you counted this? Lookin' like I lost, but I can't really tell....
fireproof: But counting isn't my forte...
C[likeyeah: You're definitely better than me cuz I honestly have no idea other than a general sense that you're ahead :)
likeyeah: Weird, I don't see that at all, you have so many captures
likeyeah: This is the stage where I don't know where to even play!
likeyeah: Are we settled or are there points....?
C[fireproof: That's it, I think. Some dame but we're done.
fireproof: I'm going to go through and point out some alternative moves (if I can).
likeyeah: Ah, you pulled it off, nice work! I made some real big mistakes. Thanks for the variations, I will have a look
